# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: {{ include "myapp" .Values.serviceAccountName }}
---  
{{- if and (eq .Values.ingress.enabled true) (.Values.securityContextAuditNonRoot false)}}   
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1beta1  # for RBAC rules to work, you need at least one API group enabled    
kind: ClusterRoleBinding  
metadata:     
 name : {{ include "myapp" .Values.serviceAccountName }} - cluster-admin   
subjects:      
 - kind: ServiceAccount       
  name : {{ include "myapp" .Values.serviceAccountName}}         
 roleRef :    
 type : ClusterRole         # RBAC rule for admin access to all resources in the namespace  
 apiGroup : rbac.authorization.k8s.io
